title: 훈남 학원쌤이 내게 고백했다| [루대숲] - 1번째 사연
text:
This episode is an adaptation of a real life story submitted and
the characters and events may differ from the real events. We are a pair of young lovebirds about to become a couple. But. I'll go first. You come in 10 minutes after. Okay! I'm a student and he's an instructor at an academy. Ep 01. Can I date an instructor 8 years older than me? Our secret story. Rudaesoop. Hello. I'm an 18-year-old high school student,
Hwang Saebin (pseudonym) I attend an academy, just like any other student. There's a really handsome instructor at my academy. Teacher! Where did you get this profile photo? What's this? I saw on your Instagram, where did you go? You went with a girl, right? One at a time! He's handsome and has graduated from a prestigious college so he has a group of fans within the academy and is very popular. Saebin, you're here. Yes... hello. The passage in here appears in exams a lot so study it well. I said I'd buy a meal for the student who had the most score improvement. Do you remember? The lucky student is... with 20 point improvement, Hwang Saebin! Wow, eating alone with Namhoon? I'm so jealous. He was the object of everyone's love and I was one of them, so I tried hard to look nice in front of him. Alone with him... What? Nothing! This is really tasty. Isn't it? Yes!
